team_governance_contract.boundary: Source contract only. Customer-distribution Real GA requires a live GitHub control-plane report proving the repository is organization-owned, required teams are closed/visible with explicit write-or-higher access, every team has at least two members and an independent reviewer for the checked commit, CODEOWNERS resolves only to those teams, branch protection requires CODEOWNERS review, admins are enforced, and no bypass or personal fallback owner is active.

live_branch_protection_control_plane.boundary: Live GitHub control-plane verification only; it combines legacy protection and active Rulesets to check exact required contexts, strict status, approvals, stale and last-push review policy, Code Owner review, signed commits, linear history, deployments, lock, deletion/force-push controls, admin enforcement, and bypass actors. It does not replace signed artifacts, push, soak, rollback, backup/restore, or failure-injection evidence.

native_signed_artifact_binding.platform_identity_policy: Android signer certificate, iOS Team ID/provisioning profile/IPA codesign identifier, macOS Developer ID/notarization submission, and Windows Authenticode signer/certificate must be verified and bound to source commit, build run, signing run, artifact attestation, and Main Verification run.
native_signed_artifact_binding.boundary: Main Verification records every native-build and signed-artifact evidence path and per-file hash for the current commit. Real GA requires all four native build evidence files and all four signed artifact evidence files, exact final-artifact digest-set equality, platform signer identity, source commit, build/signing run ids, per-artifact attestation, and the producing Main Verification run id.

current_release_artifact_binding.boundary: The Release workflow rehashes every distributable Android, iOS, macOS and Windows file from the current run and must pass this gate before Customer GA evaluation and before signing the aggregate release payload. Candidate runs only record blockers.

security_attack_surface_gate.boundary: Source/config gate only; it does not replace live penetration, signing, push, soak, rollback, backup/restore, or failure-injection evidence.

model_live_smoke_evidence.boundary: Validates a real model Q&A smoke evidence document; it does not generate or simulate a model response.

bigseller_route_enablement.boundary: Verifies BigSeller routes remain explicitly gated and Admin dead-letter operations exist. It does not prove live BigSeller traffic.

bigseller_real_contract_workflow.boundary: Candidate mode audits source wiring; real-ga mode fails closed unless approved BigSeller live inputs are provided by the operator environment.

bigseller_live_smoke_evidence.boundary: Validates real BigSeller auth/order/inventory/webhook evidence from an approved BigSeller environment; it does not use the mock adapter and does not generate or simulate BigSeller responses.

main_verification_evidence.policy: Every protected main merge commit must have a successful main-verification workflow artifact whose evidence digest, native signed artifact binding status, source commit and workflow run id are bound to the merge commit.

main_verification_live_artifact.boundary: Live GitHub Actions artifact verification only; it proves the commit-addressed Main Verification evidence artifact exists and has not expired.

external_evidence_required.native_build: true Flutter/Rust/Tauri native build evidence with artifact references and sha256 checks
external_evidence_required.signed_artifacts: true Android/iOS/Desktop signed artifacts, including macOS notarization and platform signature verification
external_evidence_required.native_signed_artifact_bindings: Main Verification artifact must prove every release payload sha256 equals signed external-evidence sha256 equals native binding sha256 for Android, iOS, macOS and Windows, then bind platform signer identity, source commit, build/signing run ids, per-artifact attestation, Main Verification run id and Real GA summary path
external_evidence_required.current_release_artifact_binding: the actual distributable files built by the current Release run must be rehashed and match the external signed evidence, attestation subjects and Main Verification per-artifact digest bindings before Customer GA and final aggregate-payload signing
external_evidence_required.live_branch_protection_control_plane: live GitHub branch-protection API report matching .github/branch-protection.required.json
external_evidence_required.team_governance_control_plane: live GitHub API report proving Organization owner, closed/visible teams with explicit repository access, two-person membership and reviewer independence, team-only CODEOWNERS, enforced code-owner review, and no bypass or personal fallback
external_evidence_required.model_live_smoke: live model Q&A smoke proving non-empty response, trace, audit event, cost ledger, and budget enforcement
external_evidence_required.bigseller_live_smoke: true BigSeller staging smoke proving auth, order list, inventory list, webhook signature, replay guard, trace, audit, and no secret leakage
external_evidence_required.main_verification_live_artifact: successful post-merge Main Verification run with unexpired commit-addressed evidence artifact
external_evidence_required.oci_app_image_digest: release workflow must capture final registry sha256 digest
external_evidence_required.oci_sandbox_runner_digest: release environment must provide final sandbox-runner sha256 digest
external_evidence_required.macos_notarization: must be attached by native signer CI before customer distribution
external_evidence_required.windows_code_signing: must be attached by native signer CI before customer distribution
external_evidence_required.android_signed_aab: must be produced by mobile signer CI before Play distribution
external_evidence_required.ios_testflight_or_signed_ipa: must be produced by iOS signer CI before TestFlight/App Store distribution
external_evidence_required.push_delivery: true APNS/FCM push delivery evidence with provider receipt ids
external_evidence_required.apns_fcm_live_push: must be verified in staging with provider credentials
external_evidence_required.postgres_soak: true multi-instance Postgres soak with at least three gateways, two workers, sixty minutes, and zero critical failures
external_evidence_required.multi_instance_postgres_soak: must be verified with at least three gateways and multiple workers
external_evidence_required.rollback_drill: must include failed rollout and SLO recovery evidence
external_evidence_required.backup_restore_drill: must include restore timestamp, RPO, and RTO evidence
external_evidence_required.self_healing_failure_injection: must include controlled failure injection, containment action, rollback/proposal decision, and post-recovery health verification
external_evidence_required.web_admin_signed_oci_image: must be produced by release CI with digest-pinned base image and Cosign signature
external_evidence_required.desktop_native_signed_artifacts: must include platform-specific signed macOS/Windows/Linux artifacts before customer distribution
external_evidence_required.device_signature_live_rollout: must verify real desktop/mobile challenge verification and signed-request enforcement in staging

policy: Source gates may prove enforcement logic exists; distribution GA requires scripts/check_real_ga_complete.py, scripts/check_main_verification_artifact_live.py, and scripts/check_current_release_artifact_binding.py to pass against the current Release payload plus real external signer, attestation, registry, store, staging, push, approved integration, GitHub organization/team control-plane, and operations evidence.
